---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new read-only tool or capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem / use case
What are you trying to do? What's missing today?

## Proposed solution
Describe the tool or capability. **Note:** this edition is read-only — proposals
should be `SAFE_READ` (no config changes / destructive operations).

## XCO / RESTCONF source
Which XCO API or RESTCONF RPC would back this? (endpoint / RPC name if known)

## Alternatives considered
Any workarounds or alternatives you've thought about.

## Additional context
Anything else that helps (sample payloads, links).
